snapshot.scope: Independent Product Planning review binds the protected signed-alpha publication workflow mechanically replayed from Development onto sole origin/main af2c7ec, including immutable release-action pins and minimum release/security/trace owner synchronization without product, service or renderer changes.

reviewers.task: Protected signed-alpha publication contract and governance review
reviewers.independence: Product Planning did not author the Development release workflow or security pin commits and independently compared their exact bytes with release, security, phase, trace, acceptance and decision owners.

dimensions.summary: The existing Release Engineering owner remains the single publication contract; the candidate adds scripts and one workflow without a duplicate release owner or product-facing surface.

Release Engineering, Security Threat Model, Playbook, traceability and the accepted decision agree on protected alpha tags, protected environment, required platform signing and independent artifact verification.
PIGE-REL-001, PIGE-REL-005 and E9.08 remain planned; the acceptance targets record implemented but unexecuted publication infrastructure and preserve every external release evidence gap.

Focused release tests cover protected invocation, exact tag/commit/version identity, immutable metadata, action pins and separation from unsigned packageability; repository gates remain directly runnable.
The synchronization is confined to existing release/security/governance owners plus their semantic lock and independent review recipe; no new owner document or duplicated release narrative was added.

verification.command: Independent review of Development release commits bd6d93b and 3a9b8eb on origin/main af2c7ec
verification.evidence: Review confirms protected tag-push-only authority, production-release environment, required signing/notarization/Authenticode, exact tag/version/commit binding, immutable alpha metadata and action commit pins; product/service/renderer code is unchanged.

verification.command: npm run verify:docs && npm run verify:decisions && npm run verify:traceability
verification.evidence: Links, whitespace, document map, PRD structure, decisions and locked release claims pass with no Requirement, Exit or Phase promotion.

verification.command: npm run verify:contracts && npm run verify:independent-documentation-review && npm run verify:documentation-leanness
verification.evidence: CON-001 through CON-004 remain green; focused release tests, typecheck and build bind the exact workflow/scripts while this review covers all changed governed owners.

coordination.compatibility: The candidate adds a fail-closed release publication path and supply-chain pins without changing product, service, renderer, durable data or update-runtime behavior; unsigned packageability remains separate internal evidence.
coordination.acknowledgement: Product Planning reviewed the exact Development bytes and synchronized only release/security/governance owners; this foundation does not claim credentials, signed artifacts, an actual release or Public Alpha readiness.

nonBlockingRisks: Production signing certificates, Apple notarization credentials, protected-environment approval and Windows Authenticode material are external and were not available to this candidate.

No real signed/notarized macOS artifact, Authenticode Windows installer, independent release run, GitHub prerelease, release notes or alpha-to-alpha update was produced; no Requirement, Exit or Phase status is promoted.
